description: What to analyze for each page type when reviewing screenshots. For each item, determine whether to Preserve (keep in demo) or Improve (show a better version).

analyze.look_for: Banner layout, promotional content, seasonal campaigns, value proposition
Placement (top nav vs hero), placeholder text, search icon style, prominence
Main categories visible, mega-menu vs dropdown, hierarchy depth exposed, mobile adaptation
How products are surfaced on homepage — recommendations, trending, new arrivals, curated collections
Info density — image, name, price, ratings, colors/variants, quick-add button, wishlist
Any 'For You', 'Recommended', or personalized sections visible without login
Reviews, ratings, social proof, delivery promises, return policy
Product suggestions with images/prices, category suggestions, query suggestions, federated results, response speed
Grid vs list, columns count, card density, image aspect ratio
Which attributes are filterable, sidebar vs top-bar, visual facets (color swatches, size pills), collapsible sections, active filter chips
Available sort modes — relevance, price asc/desc, popularity, newest, rating
Are top results relevant to query? Any obvious misranking? Highlighting of matched terms?
What happens with zero results — suggestions, did-you-mean, category fallbacks?
Total count shown, pagination vs infinite scroll vs load-more
Banners in results, pinned/boosted products, promotional badges (sale, new, bestseller)
Image count, zoom capability, thumbnail strip, video content, 360 view
Name, brand, price, description placement and length, SKU visibility
Color selection (swatches vs dropdown), size selection (pills vs dropdown), stock indicators per variant
Rating display, review count, review snippets, rating breakdown
Button prominence, quantity selector, wishlist option, buy-now shortcut
Related products, 'Looking Similar', 'Frequently Bought Together', 'Complete the Look' — note which types are present and their placement
Shipping info, store availability, return policy, click & collect
Breadcrumbs, sub-category links, depth of navigation, sibling categories visible
Do filters change per category? Are irrelevant facets hidden?
Same as search results or different layout? Category-specific merchandising?
Category description, hero banner, editorial content, buying guides
Visual sub-category cards/tiles, sidebar tree, tag cloud
